description: Gold layer configuration for gaps in care - simplified BIS-style

gold_tables.sql_script: SELECT ch."EncounterICN" as gapsInCareID, DATE_PART('year', CURRENT_DATE) * 100 + DATE_PART('month', CURRENT_DATE) as yearMonth, ch."HICNumber" as planMemberID, 'DIABETES' as measureID, 'A1C' as subMeasureID, 'HEDIS_DIABETES_A1C' as measureCode, 'Diabetes A1C Control' as measureName, CASE WHEN EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM claim_lines cl WHERE cl."ClaimLineEncounterICN" = ch."EncounterICN" AND cl."ServiceLineProcedureCode" IN ('83036', '83037')) THEN 1 ELSE 0 END as numerCnt, 1 as denomCnt, 'A1C Test Required' as eventName, ch."MemberDOB" as dateOfService, ch."BillingProviderNPI" as providerID, ch."BillingProviderLastOrOrg" as providerName, ch."PrincipalDiagnosisCode" as claimNumber, CURRENT_TIMESTAMP as creationDateTime FROM claim_headers ch WHERE ch."RecordType" = 'C' AND (ch."PrincipalDiagnosisCode" LIKE 'E11%' OR ch."Diag1" LIKE 'E11%' OR ch."Diag2" LIKE 'E11%')
